summary: ANDROID 🟥 FMD | When onboarding and 'Dont allow' for location selected then in FMD in main settings dialog keep showing
scenario: Find My Device location permission dialog repeatedly pops up in main settings when 'Don't allow' is selected during onboarding
description_clean: When onboarding and 'Don't allow' is selected for location access, the Find My Device (FMD) location collection dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings screen. After the first occurrence, the issue no longer appears and the device settings and tone playback work correctly.
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Begin the onboarding flow for a new Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. When prompted for location permission, select 'Don't allow'.
4. Observe the main settings screen (Home → Device Settings).
5. Note that the Find My Device (FMD) location collection dialog appears repeatedly.
6. Dismiss the dialog each time it appears.
7. After the first occurrence, verify that the dialog no longer reappears.
8. Navigate to Device Settings and verify that device settings and tone playback function correctly.
expected: After selecting 'Don't allow' for location access during onboarding, the Find My Device location collection dialog should appear only once (or not at all) and should not repeatedly pop up. Device settings and tone playback should work correctly.
actual: The Find My Device location collection dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings screen after selecting 'Don't allow' for location access during onboarding. After the first occurrence, the issue no longer appears and device settings and tone playback work correctly.
